summary: Iteration 10 — validated 4 developer-experience improvements (ErrorBoundary + Esc-close hook + Save-as-template Dialog + Inline rename) end-to-end. All 15 sub-checks PASSED. (1) ErrorBoundary: data-testid='error-boundary' absent on /, /edit/page/pg_2f793530a12a, /edit/section/sec_9362a807e91c — boundary correctly NOT firing under normal conditions. (2) Esc close works for all 4 modals: PageTemplatePicker (dashboard New page), SectionPicker (dashboard New section), SectionPicker (SectionRail footer rail-new-section), BlockAdder (PageRail Add block). (3) SaveAsTemplateDialog fully verified: title 'Save as template', body copy 'Snapshot this page's 6 blocks', name input auto-focused and prefilled with 'Testing page', description empty, Submit disabled when name cleared, closes via Cancel/Esc/successful submit (template saved — flow completes, dialog unmounts). (4) Inline rename verified on all three rail row types — Section (double-click → input appears with name-input testid → Enter commits → reload persists via api.updateSection → Esc restores original), Page (same pattern for page-rail-item-<id>-name → api.updatePage persists), Block (block-name-<id>-input → Enter commits → reload persists via page autosave). Single-click on a rail row still navigates (Link click not broken by InlineEditableLabel's onDoubleClick/stopPropagation). Block drag handles (block-drag-<id>) are separate from rename input — 6 drag handles present on Testing page.
action_items: (optional cleanup) Save-as-template flow created a template named 'TEST Template iter10' during testing — safe to delete via Page Templates admin.

(optional cleanup) Block blk_hdgptdnb on pg_2f793530a12a (Testing page) is now named 'Renamed Block blk_hd' (was 'Hero') as the persistence test commit. Rename back via dbl-click if the demo name matters.

(nit) InlineEditableLabel's onDoubleClick calls stopPropagation only when stopClickBubbling=true (default). Consider also stopping the mousedown on the span in edit-mode — currently only the inner input stops mousedown. Harmless today because dblclick outruns any drag start, but if someone wires up a drag handler to the outer row, rename could start a drag instead of editing.

(nit) When opening SaveAsTemplateDialog, the 'Snapshot this page's {n} block{s}' copy uses straight apostrophe inside a JS string — fine, but consider rendering a typographic curly quote (’) or escaping to avoid the awkward straight-quote in UI copy.
critical_code_review_comments: useEscapeKey stops propagation on every Escape keydown even when multiple modals are stacked. If two Esc-listening modals are ever mounted simultaneously, both would fire because document-level listeners are not stacked — document-level stopPropagation between peer listeners is a no-op. Not a bug today (single-modal UX) but document the single-modal invariant or add a global 'topmost' registry for safety.

InlineEditableLabel.commit() discards edits when next is empty (no onCommit call + setEditing(false)) but keeps the blank draft rendered until next re-open. Edge case: if a user selects-all and hits Enter, the label silently reverts — consider a brief toast or visual shake so the no-op is visible.

SaveAsTemplateDialog onSubmit awaits onOpenChange(false) inside try/finally but if onSubmit throws, the finally clears submitting and the dialog stays open with no error surface. PageEditor.saveAsTemplate should wrap api.createPageTemplate in a toast.error path so users see why submission failed.

SectionRail + PageRail both re-fetch the full list on every activePageId/activeSectionId change. Fine at 12 sections / 2 pages but will become a latency tax at 100+. Consider mutating local state from the rename commit (already done) and skipping the background re-fetch in the renameSection/renamePage happy path.

The data-testid for block rename input is 'block-name-<block_id>-input' but for sections/pages it's '<row-testid>-name-input'. This asymmetry is intentional (block labels don't share the row testid), but worth documenting next to InlineEditableLabel's props — the suffix rule ('<testid>-input') is implicit.

PageRail is 586 lines with 6 co-located subcomponents (RailTab, CollapsedTabButton, RailFooterButton, BlocksList, BlockRow, PagesList). Still readable but past the 'split-threshold' — extract BlocksList + PagesList into sibling files (PageRailBlocks.jsx / PageRailPages.jsx) to keep PageRail.jsx as the layout/orchestration shell.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (15/15 functional checks across the 4 features + regression on single-click nav + drag handles)

Regression on iter9 features (Content Block buttons[], Product Carousel empty defaults, Logo Strip uploaded logos, Hero contentMaxWidth=1200, ?new=1 deferred-delete) was NOT re-run explicitly — source files for those features (content.js, logos.js, hero.js, Editor.jsx, Dashboard.jsx, SectionRail.jsx) were unchanged in this iteration per the review brief (diff is isolated to ErrorBoundary, InlineEditableLabel, useEscapeKey, SaveAsTemplateDialog, and the rail/editor files that consume them), so those fixes are assumed intact.
